title: Build an AI Chat App with Next.js
description: End-to-end route for building a streaming AI chat application with authentication, persistent chat history, and production deployment.

steps.description: Initialize a new Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up Tailwind CSS for styling
Install shadcn/ui for chat UI components
Add authentication to protect the chat interface
Set up database to persist chat conversations and message history
Integrate Vercel AI SDK v4 with streaming chat API route and useChat hook
Add Upstash Redis for per-user rate limiting on the AI endpoint
Deploy to Vercel with AI API key env vars configured
